ddls:
CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the research project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the research project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the research project */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator leading the project */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed, paused) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the research site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the research site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the research site */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the research site */,
  "site_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the site, including habitat type and other relevant information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data (e.g., camera trap, sensor, manual observation) */,
  "sampling_strategy" TEXT /* Sampling strategy used for data collection (e.g., random, stratified) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project the dataset belongs to */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research site where the dataset was collected */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "dataset_description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., camera trap, sensor, manual observation) */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., CSV, JSON, image) */,
  "data_size" TEXT /* Size of the dataset in bytes */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Rating or description of the data quality */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the dataset was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES research_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the data point belongs to */,
  "data_point_name" TEXT /* Name of the data point */,
  "data_point_value" TEXT /* Value of the data point */,
  "data_point_date" TEXT /* Date the data point was collected */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data point (e.g., camera trap, sensor, manual observation) */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data point (e.g., CSV, JSON, image) */,
  "data_size" TEXT /* Size of the data point in bytes */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Rating or description of the data quality */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude where the data point was collected */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude where the data point was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chimpanzees" (
  "chimp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chimpanzee */,
  "chimp_name" TEXT /* Name of the chimpanzee */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the chimpanzee */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the chimpanzee */,
  "social_hierarchy" TEXT /* Social hierarchy position of the chimpanzee */,
  "birth_year" INTEGER /* Birth year of the chimpanzee */,
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent chimpanzee (if known) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the chimpanzee (e.g., alive, deceased) */,
  "health_status" TEXT /* Health status of the chimpanzee (e.g., healthy, sick) */,
  "last_observed_date" TEXT /* Date the chimpanzee was last observed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chimp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "chimp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chimpanzee being observed */,
  "observation_date" TEXT /* Date of the observation */,
  "observation_notes" TEXT /* Notes taken during the observation */,
  "observer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who made the observation */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the observation was made */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the observation */,
  "behavior_type" TEXT /* Type of behavior observed (e.g., feeding, playing, resting) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_chimp_id FOREIGN KEY ("chimp_id") REFERENCES chimpanzees ("chimp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_observer_id FOREIGN KEY ("observer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "chimp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chimpanzee participating in the experiment */,
  "experiment_date" TEXT /* Date of the experiment */,
  "experiment_notes" TEXT /* Notes taken during the experiment */,
  "experimenter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who conducted the experiment */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of experiment (e.g., cognitive, social) */,
  "experiment_setup" TEXT /* Description of the experiment setup */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_experimenter_id FOREIGN KEY ("experimenter_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_chimp_id FOREIGN KEY ("chimp_id") REFERENCES chimpanzees ("chimp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "habitat_usage" (
  "habitat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each habitat usage event */,
  "chimp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chimpanzee using the habitat */,
  "habitat_date" TEXT /* Date of the habitat usage */,
  "habitat_notes" TEXT /* Notes taken during the habitat usage */,
  "habitat_type" TEXT /* Type of habitat (e.g., forest, savannah) */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Activity the chimpanzee was engaged in (e.g., foraging, resting) */,
  "observer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who observed the habitat usage */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the habitat usage observation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("habitat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_habitat_usage_chimp_id FOREIGN KEY ("chimp_id") REFERENCES chimpanzees ("chimp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_habitat_usage_observer_id FOREIGN KEY ("observer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password for security */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the data model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the data model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of data model (e.g., machine learning, statistical) */,
  "algorithm_used" TEXT /* Algorithm used in the data model */,
  "model_accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the data model */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data model used for the analysis */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date of the analysis */,
  "result_notes" TEXT /* Notes taken during the analysis */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., trend analysis, correlation analysis) */,
  "method_used" TEXT /* Method used for the analysis */,
  "result_accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the analysis results */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the analysis results were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES data_models ("model_id")
)
